subject: Transfer Step 0 (cache validation) into combined notebook
description: Add a new markdown section '## Step 0: Cache Validation' followed by code cells to pre_processing_notebook_csd.py.ipynb, transferring the functional logic of pre_csd_0_cache.py's validate_parquet_cache() (currently at 02_thesis_data/_02_preprocessing/nielsen/CSD/pipeline_step_scripts/pre_csd_0_cache.py, lines 111-181). Strip the __main__/argparse CLI wrapper (main(), lines 182+) and redundant module docstring/boilerplate imports already present earlier in the notebook (sys, Path, root-finding block) -- reuse the notebook's existing PROJECT INITIALIZATION cell instead of duplicating it. Keep only the validation logic: checking whether the 4 Nielsen CSD view parquet files exist in the expected cache directory, and printing/returning their status. Insert immediately after the notebook's existing imports/config cells and before the current Cell 1 (Step 1's load, which itself will be replaced in Task 2). Display the validation result (e.g. a small status table or print block) directly in the notebook's output cell so Brian can see cache state before proceeding. Verify by running the new cells top-to-bottom in Jupyter and confirming the printed cache status matches what `python pre_csd_0_cache.py` currently reports for CSD.
activeForm: Transferring Step 0 (cache validation) into combined notebook
